name: .NET DLL Loaded Via Office Applications
description: Detects the loading of a .NET DLL from the Global Assembly Cache (GAC) by an Office application (Word, PowerPoint, Excel, Outlook). This is unusual behavior and can indicate an attempt to execute malicious code within the Office application's process.

prompts.prompt: Unusual loading of a .NET DLL by an Office application from the Global Assembly Cache (GAC) detected. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Image Loaded** {image_loaded}, **Parent Process Name** {parent_process_name}. Investigate this high-risk activity immediately as it may indicate an attempt to execute malicious code within the Office application.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Image Loaded (should be 7).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The Office application process name (e.g., winword.exe, powerpnt.exe, excel.exe, outlook.exe).

parameters.name: image_loaded
parameters.description: The path of the loaded .NET DLL from the GAC.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The parent process that launched the Office application.
